title: Maces AS+: PvP Mace Pack
description: This resource pack that adds Custom Item Textures for the Mace depending on the enchantment. Breach Mace and Wind Burst Mace now look different!
body:
# About

**_Note: you NEED Variants-CIT v5.0.0+ for the custom textures to work. Do not use CIT Resewn, it doesn't work for this pack._**

Maces And Stuff+ is a resource pack that adds Custom Item Textures for the Mace depending on the enchantment. Low fire included! Optimized for MCPVP (mcpvp.club) enchantments. Breach Mace and Wind Burst Mace now look visibly different! Multiple PvP enhancements for a more competitive experience in servers or on your own.

# Features
- Cleaner sword textures for all variants of swords
- Animated wind burst
- Hyper-visible shield
- Better shield hit sound
- Metal crit sound
- Low fire (animated)
- Low shield with side model
- Gold-framed crystal
- Gold-rimmed pearl
- Breach mace
- Wind Burst mace
- Clear vignette
- Clear pumpkin blur
- Better apple and gapple textures
- Visible bow/crossbow charging levels
- Highlightted respawn anchor max charge

# Additional info
There are some language changes in this pack. For English US, the items that are changed as are follows:
- Gapple renamed to "Cookie"
- Notch Apple renamed to "Chocolate Cookie"

**_Recommended modpack:\
PvP+ Reimagined (includes performance mods and this resource pack)_**

All assets used in this pack are either original or used according to the original creator's licensing. Built for Variants-CIT v5.0.0+
